allow: Bash(python3 scripts/search.py "personal finance budgeting fintech app trustworthy modern minimal" --design-system -f markdown -p "Astrea Budget")
Bash(python3 -c "import sys,json; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); print\([v['version'] for v in d['versions'][-8:]]\)")
Bash(python3 -c "import sys,json; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); print\('latest',d['latest']['version']\); print\([v['version'] for v in d['versions'][-6:]]\)")
Bash(which flutter; echo "---"; cat ~/.zshrc 2>/dev/null | grep -iE "rbenv|rvm|path|ruby|pod|flutter|homebrew|brew" | head -40)

Bash(echo "=== .zprofile ==="; grep -iE "brew|homebrew|path" ~/.zprofile 2>/dev/null; echo "=== .zshenv ==="; grep -iE "brew|homebrew|path" ~/.zshenv 2>/dev/null; echo "=== /etc/paths ==="; cat /etc/paths 2>/dev/null)
